isi.lyrics:
Lyric CHAEYOUNG (TWICE) - BF

Romanization

haru oenjongil nuwoisseo simsimhaeseo
museun yoirinjido molla an nagaseo
honjammari tto neureonna bwa
meokgo sipeun geotdo eopseoseo
inhyeongdeulman ssayeogana bwa
Oh dear my bestfriend
I don’t wanna see your face
I can feel it through ur text
I won’t need those photographs
Cuz we’re best friend

Hangeul

하루 왼종일 누워있어 심심해서
무슨 요일인지도 몰라 안 나가서
혼잣말이 또 늘었나 봐
먹고 싶은 것도 없어서
인형들만 쌓여가나 봐
Oh dear my bestfriend
I don’t wanna see your face
I can feel it through ur text
I won’t need those photographs
Cuz we’re best friend

I can feel it through ur text
I won’t need those photographs
Cuz we’re best friend

isi.lyrics:
Lyric CHAEYOUNG (TWICE) - DOWNPOUR (feat. Gliiico)

Romanization

Kick me when I’m down yeah
I won’t make a sound yeah
I know you next to “hmm”, yeah
Textin’ me you miss me yeah
Its a shame that you changed
Now I play this game
Without you,
How can we both be to blame
Now the rain ain’t the same
Without you
A love you never needed
I love you, now I’m leaving
A love you never needed
I love you, now I’m leaving
usaneun tto neureoga
amureoji ana
geojimmarin geo ara
Textin’ me you miss me yeah

Hangeul

I won’t make a sound yeah
I know you next to “hmm”, yeah
Textin’ me you miss me yeah

Now I play this game
Without you,

우산은 또 늘어가
아무렇지 않아
거짓말인 거 알아
Textin’ me you miss me yeah

isi.lyrics:
Lyric CHAEYOUNG (TWICE) - RIBBONS (feat. SUMIN, Jibin of Y2K92)

Romanization

gominggominiji
nae meorineun frizzy
dwiteullin eolgul sumgyeobwado
But I really don’t need plea
neoneun an boiji? uri sone deun uiji
malhaejwodo utji ttange mutgo sumgigo
deullineun geomman gatji
Girl georeoyaji
I pull up in lace, customize
My heart no chain, no compromise
The flame on my breath, vaporize
Friends turn to fog, I analyze
georeoyaji
Sweet with the hook, I dramatize
Energize energize
Thorns in my heel, glamorize
Chicken fries, Chicken fries
Swallow my pride with chicken fries
Swallow my pride with chicken fries
Chicken fries
Swallow my pride with chicken fries
geurae nugudo moreune naui yaegi
eodie nal dugo tteonanneunji
naega bon bamui geu harusari
sinho du beonina nochyeo
meori gamgi sireo moja sseugo nubyeo gireul georeo
ttame jjeoreoinneun son
jumeonie gamchwonne
I pull up in lace, customize
My heart no chain, no compromise
The flame on my breath, vaporize
Friends turn to fog, I analyze
jumeonie gamchwonne
Sweet with the hook, I dramatize
Energize energize
Thorns in my heel, glamorize
Chicken fries, Chicken fries
Wave your ribbons, dance like reborn
bamhaneul wiro bitnaneun My logo
modeun banjjagi, uril dalmatji
sarainneun maeumi uril chajanaeji Girl
Wave your ribbons, dance like reborn
bamhaneul wiro bitnaneun My logo
modeun banjjagi, uril dalmatji
sarainneun maeumi uril chajanaeji Girl
Step in the void, we verify
Light in my soul, we amplify
Cold in the breeze, I hear the cry
Ghosts in the past, let’s let them die

Hangeul

고민고민이지
내 머리는 frizzy
뒤틀린 얼굴 숨겨봐도
But I really don’t need plea
너는 안 보이지? 우리 손에 든 의지
말해줘도 웃지 땅에 묻고 숨기고
들리는 것만 갖지
Girl 걸어야지
I pull up in lace, customize
My heart no chain, no compromise
The flame on my breath, vaporize
Friends turn to fog, I analyze
걸어야지
Sweet with the hook, I dramatize
Energize energize
Thorns in my heel, glamorize
Chicken fries, Chicken fries
Swallow my pride with chicken fries
Swallow my pride with chicken fries
Chicken fries
Swallow my pride with chicken fries
그래 누구도 모르네 나의 얘기
어디에 날 두고 떠났는지
내가 본 밤의 그 하루살이
신호 두 번이나 놓쳐
머리 감기 싫어 모자 쓰고 누벼 길을 걸어
땀에 쩔어있는 손
주머니에 감췄네

My heart no chain, no compromise

주머니에 감췄네
Sweet with the hook, I dramatize
Energize energize
Thorns in my heel, glamorize
Chicken fries, Chicken fries
Wave your ribbons, dance like reborn
밤하늘 위로 빛나는 My logo
모든 반짝이, 우릴 닮았지
살아있는 마음이 우릴 찾아내지 Girl
Wave your ribbons, dance like reborn
